title: Wege zu Kraft und Schönheit - Ein Film über moderne Körperkultur
writer: Nicholas Kaufmann, Ernst Krieger, Wilhelm Prager
actors: Josephine Baker, Anita Berber, Kitty Cauer
plot: The perfect body as an object of cult worship. Based on the mass sports and body worship movement of the 1920s, the film propagates physical training and shows in stylized documentary scenes aspects of physical hygiene, gymnastics...
